testcase.name: E2E: Readable agent output > live output shows formatted text, not raw JSON, when agent emits NDJSON
E2E: Readable agent output > live output renders markdown elements (code block, list) when agent emits markdown
E2E: Readable agent output > archived output shows formatted text, not raw JSON
E2E: Readable agent output > archived output renders markdown elements (code block, list) when agent emitted markdown
E2E: Readable agent output > plain text or non-JSON output passes through unchanged

E2E: Assign task to teammate, verify no agent pickup; unassign and verify eligible > assigns ready task to teammate, verifies human assignee excluded from agent dispatch; unassigns and verifies eligible
coder.svg > exists and is valid SVG
coder.svg > steam paths use same stroke color and stroke-width as mug outline
coder.svg > mug outline uses stroke #818cf8 and stroke-width 2.5
coder.svg > icon remains recognizable with steam and mug elements
E2E: Plan version flow (execute, edit, version dropdown, Execute vN) > full user flow: select v1 in version dropdown, see read-only v1, click Execute v1 and confirm execution uses v1 content
